name: affinity-system-mvp
title: 好感度系统 MVP
description: 实现完整访客-NPC好感度系统：好感度等级制度、计算规则、NPC行为影响、前端UI展示
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-04-27: Completed affinity system MVP. All core components implemented: AffinityStage enum (6 stages), AffinityCalculator with chat/decay/gameplay logic, AffinityPromptBuilder for NPC behavior injection, tone property per stage, decay wiring in runtime.py (both _update_affinity_from_chat and _touch_visitor_state), /api/v1/affinity/stages endpoint, AffinityProgress.tsx/AffinityBadge.tsx frontend components wired into TavernContextPanel and TavernMemoryPanel, affinity.js frontend library, backend tests (23 tests passing), WORLD_SCHEMA.md updated. The MVP is fully done.

done: affinity.py: AffinityStage enum (6 stages), AffinityCalculator, AffinityPromptBuilder, tone property, to_definition()
affinity.js: Frontend library with normalize/percent/stage functions
runtime.py: _update_affinity_from_chat, decay wiring in chat and visit paths
TavernContextPanel.jsx: AffinityBadge + AffinityProgress wired in MemoryTab
prompt_builder.py: _affinity_prompt_context uses AffinityPromptBuilder, wired into build() and _render_prompt_block()
WORLD_SCHEMA.md: Updated VisitorState interface and AffinityStageDefinition
test_affinity.py: 23 tests covering all core paths (all passing)
